;<span id="Extract">extract</span>
:in [[Glossary:Incremental_reading|incremental reading]], a portion of text taken from a larger article and scheduled for [[Glossary:Review|review]] and processing as a separate [[Glossary:Topic|topic]] (located in the [[Glossary:Knowledge_tree|knowledge tree]] as a [[Glossary:Child|child]] of the parenting article). In [[Glossary:Incremental_learning|incremental learning]], you can also extract portions of videos, images, sounds, etc. For example, you can extract a picture of Ghana when learning about Ghana and you already have a political map of Africa in your [[Glossary:Collection|collection]]. Use '''[[Glossary:Zoom&trim_mode|Zoom]]''' if you want to retain Africa, extract Ghana, and save space by not generating a new '''extract'''. For more about extracts see: [[Extract]]
